### Description

A PR to introduce a new term.

### Checklist

- [ ] Check that the Vault APY matches what is reported for the pool on yearn.finance
- [ ] Check that the UI fixed rate APY matches the Initial APR we agreed to initialize to.
- [ ] Check term date is correct number of months or days and ends on a Friday.

### Screenshots

Include screenshots to show the new term on the earn view and fixed rates view
